title: Benchmark distilled vs full-size models for BigClungus workloads

log.message: Created from Congress #95 verdict on: if we were considering distilling our own model or using a distilled model, is the act of distillati

Source verdict: ABORTED by Ibrahim: The debate is already over. Four debaters independently reached the same conclusion in Round 1 — distillation is a technique, not a moral act, and objecting to the process absent m...
Starting distilled vs full-size model benchmark

Benchmark complete: 5 models x 3 workloads = 15 tests all passed. Aggregates: Full models (Grok 4, Llama-3.3-70B) avg score 8.2/10, avg latency 13.6s, avg cost $0.00399/run. Distilled models (Grok 3 mini, Mixtral-8x7B, gpt-4o-mini) avg score 7.8/10, avg latency 5.5s, avg cost $0.000166/run. Best value: Mixtral-8x7B (7.7 score, 2.8s latency, $0.000078/run). Best quality: Grok 4 (8.3 avg score, best at all workloads but 24x cost). Distilled models achieve 95% of full model quality at 4% of cost. Results saved to /mnt/data/benchmark/benchmark_results.json
